title: Maelstrom Gate Authorization Envelope
description: A signed, frozen permission set that constrains tool execution. See SPEC.md Section 8.

allowed_tools.description: All tools permitted under this envelope.

max_tool_calls.description: Maximum number of tool invocations allowed.

max_retries.description: Maximum retry attempts per tool call.

budget_seconds.description: Time budget for execution in seconds.

execution_mode.description: Execution mode based on current threat level.

dry_run.description: If true, execute without side effects.

branching.description: Whether the executor may spawn sub-tasks.

human_approved.description: Whether a human explicitly approved this invocation.

signature.description: HMAC-SHA256 hex digest over canonical envelope fields.
